title: Dependant dropdown status feature release date
excerpt:
Hey @dipro, 
Any update for this dependant dropdown feature that is mentioned last year and was planning to go live at the and of the 2022? 


Thanks!

posts.author: mehmet (mehmet)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @dipro,

Any update for this dependant dropdown feature that is mentioned last year and was planning to go live at the and of the 2022?

Multiple custom dropdown fields monday Apps & Developers
Hi @basdebruin and @AlexSavchuk, After playing a bit with this, I have another question. Is it possible to populate the second dropdown based on the value that is selected in the first one?

Thanks!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @mehmet,

We do not have an ETA on when this could be implemented.

If it does, it will be announced in our changelog here!

Cheers,
Matias
